Package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.key

package org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.key
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula
     
    org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.descriptor
     
    org.eventb.internal.pp.loader.formula.terms
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ArithmeticKey
    Arithmetic literals are uniquely identified by their type and defining terms.
    ClauseKey<T extends IndexedDescriptor>
    Clauses are uniquely identified by the formulas inside them without considering terms.
    DisjunctiveClauseKey
    Implementation of ClauseKey for disjunctive clauses.
    EqualityKey
    Equality literals are uniquely identified by their sort.
    EquivalenceClauseKey
    Implementation of ClauseKey for equivalence clauses.
    PredicateKey
    A predicate literal is uniquely identified by its sort without considering terms.
    QuantifiedLiteralKey
    This class represents an entry for a quantified predicate of the form {∀,∃}x,y,z·Lstu, where x,y,z are variables and s,t,u are terms.
    SymbolKey<T extends LiteralDescriptor>
    Symbol keys are used as keys to all symbol tables SymbolTable in the AbstractContext.
    SymbolTable<T extends LiteralDescriptor>
    This is the abstract base class for all symbol tables of the loader.
